summary: secret-catcher is a published, installable runx skill (epistemedeus/secret-catcher@sha-57996f6d5e77) that scans a unified diff for credential-like spans and returns redacted findings, a gated redaction_proposal for the redact-pii executor, and a block decision — without ever quoting a raw secret. Local harness passed 3/3; the post-publish dogfood run sealed receipt runx:receipt:sha256:dde605e431d3eed9a4ac4835e293cf5c136bf87b1c875d327dcfa253b504d7ee with block=true, and runx verify returned valid.
note: Public key only — no secret. Anyone can verify the sealed dogfood receipt with the command above.
